channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Biden accuses Trump of corruption, then has trouble leaving stage
item.description: Former President Joe Biden criticized President Trump for corruption at a Maryland Democratic rally, but later struggled to exit the stage.

item.title: Energy Companies Need Permitting Certainty
item.description: The industry will struggle to grow under a permitting system driven by political unpredictability.

item.title: Trump inspects sites critical to D.C. makeover plan
item.description: President Trump toured two locations on Sunday that are part of his planned overhaul of the nation's capital.

item.title: Sen. Mark Kelly says Biden 'did a bad job' on the border
item.description: Senator Mark Kelly strongly criticized former President Joe Biden's border policies, stating they created a crisis.
